meaning: (Royal Naval) Volunteer Reserve Decoration (英国) 皇家海军志愿后备队勋章
examples: Our construction of VRD is based on the network services of Fudan University Library (FDL), such as FAQs, Readers' Message Board, BBS and so on.
Analyzes the factors influencing the network reference service system and discusses the functions of the system taking the software VRD as an example.
By this method, we found that the VRD indices for most watersheds of the northwestern basin were less than -0.2, displaying a severe vegetation deficiency.
